## Workflow Checklist (Required)

- [ ] Tests were written first or updated first for changed behavior.
- [ ] `./scripts/test.sh` passed locally.
- [ ] `./scripts/coverage.sh` passed locally.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] `docs/IMPLEMENTATION-LOG.md` updated with this step.
- [ ] Architecture/docs updated if behavior or decisions changed.
